name: io.github.yksanjo/gmem
description: Persistent, multi-chain project memory for AI agents. Typed entities (Programs, Contracts, Decisions, Findings, Agents), git-aware diffs, transparent agent-reputation scoring. Solana + EVM + the missing trust layer for agent-to-agent payments — all in one MCP server.

environmentVariables.description: Override the auto-resolved memory database path. Defaults to ~/.gmem/<projectHash>/memory.db, with one db file per project (project root resolved from Anchor.toml or workspace Cargo.toml).
environmentVariables.name: GMEM_DB

environmentVariables.description: Helius RPC API key, used by `gmem.ingest_agent_activity` when running live (v1.2+). Not required for offline fixture-mode ingest.
environmentVariables.name: HELIUS_API_KEY
